_correction.by: Claude Code task-015 entity-architecture correction + stub-to-full implementation (preparation for PR 3 W1 task 025)
_correction.reason: Stub replaced with full implementation per R4 spec FR-9. Surfaces new sprk_workassignment records assigned to current user. Uses Spaarke custom sprk_workassignment entity (NOT OOB task activity).
_correction.previousState: 1-node stub (createNotification only, no query, no membership; referenced {{task.*}} variables that no upstream node materialized)
_correction.correctedState: Full graph: Start -> LookupUserMembership -> Query sprk_workassignment (membership-scope union) -> Condition -> CreateNotification per FR-9 + AC-5b

playbook.name: New Work Assignments
playbook.description: Notifies users when new sprk_workassignment records have been assigned to them since the last check. Uses Spaarke custom sprk_workassignment entity (NOT OOB task activity).

timeWindow.description: How far back to look for new assignments

configJson.description: Scoped to current user's matters via LookupUserMembership
Resolve the executing user's matter memberships per ADR-034. Bound to `myMatters.ids` for downstream filtering.

configJson.fetchXml: <fetch top="50"><entity name="sprk_workassignment"><attribute name="sprk_name"/><attribute name="sprk_workassignmentid"/><attribute name="sprk_workassignmentnumber"/><attribute name="sprk_priority"/><attribute name="sprk_responseduedate"/><attribute name="sprk_assignedto"/><attribute name="sprk_assignedtointernal"/><attribute name="sprk_assignedattorney1"/><attribute name="sprk_assignedparalegal1"/><attribute name="createdon"/><attribute name="modifiedon"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingrecordname"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingrecordurl"/><attribute name="sprk_regardingmatter"/><attribute name="ownerid"/><link-entity name="sprk_matter" from="sprk_matterid" to="sprk_regardingmatter" link-type="outer" alias="m"><attribute name="sprk_mattername"/><attribute name="sprk_matternumber"/><attribute name="ownerid"/></link-entity><filter type="and"><condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0"/><filter type="or"><condition attribute="createdon" operator="last-x-hours" value="{{timeWindowHours}}"/><condition attribute="modifiedon" operator="last-x-hours" value="{{timeWindowHours}}"/></filter><filter type="or"><condition attribute="sprk_regardingmatter" operator="in" value="{{joinIds myMatters.ids}}"/><condition entityname="m" attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid"/><condition attribute="ownerid" operator="eq-userid"/></filter></filter><order attribute="createdon" descending="true"/></entity></fetch>
configJson.description: New OR updated sprk_workassignment records (statecode=Active 0, createdon OR modifiedon in last {{timeWindowHours}}) where EITHER (a) sprk_regardingmatter IN myMatters.ids OR (b) record-owner OR (c) matter-owner = current user. Sort: createdon desc.
Check if any new work assignments were found
